On this page

JavaScript / TypeScript ​

Documentation for the JavaScript / TypeScript package (@safe-access-inline/safe-access-inline).

  • Getting Started — installation, usage examples, plugin system, security, I/O, framework integrations
  • API Reference — full method reference (10 formats, array ops, JSON Patch, security, schema validation, audit)
  • Plugins — shipped plugins, custom plugins, Zod validation example
